description:
Join Seane Corn for Detox Yoga Flow. Learn Corn’s approach to living a healthier, happier life through a gentle detox process. Experience elevated energy, increased circulation, weight loss, and a calmer mind.

SUBSCRIBE http://bit.ly/1fovX1i 

Connect with Gaiam Online:
Follow Gaiam on TWITTER: https://twitter.com/Gaiam

chapters.title: <Untitled Chapter 1>
place your palms on to your belly
squeeze your knees into your chest
breathe squeeze both knees into your chest
begin to pull your right thigh downward towards the floor
squeeze your right knee into your chest
curl your toes under pressing into your palms stretch
inhale lengthen the spine
put your left knee down on to the floor
lengthen through the left side of the body
squeeze the left knee open
balance the right forearm on the thigh left hand to the hip
balance the left forearm right hand on to the hip
reach the right arm out over the right ear
open the right chest towards the ceiling
inhale open your left chest twisting in the middle of the spine
extend your arms alongside the shins
support your lower back with your hands
press your heels back downward towards the floor
squeeze both knees into your chest
bring your spine back into balance
squeeze both knees back into your chest
place the right foot on to the floor
exhale place the right foot to the inside of the left thigh
fold into the straight left leg and breathe
put your left foot to the inside of the thigh
continue to purify ourselves of the tension toxins

fulltitle: Seane Corn Detox Flow Yoga | Yoga | Gaiam
